title: Python impl: Density-aware startup delay
description:
Implement density-aware startup delay in Python node.

## Files to modify
- python/src/lichen/announce/scheduler.py - density-aware initial_delay
- python/src/lichen/node.py - add listen-first coordinator if needed
- Possibly add python/src/lichen/startup.py for shared startup logic

## Changes
1. Add DensityDetector or similar to track unique nodes heard
2. Modify SchedulerConfig to accept density-based delay calculation
3. Add listen-first period before starting announce scheduler
4. Apply same delay scaling to DIO/DIS timing (if RPL is in Python)

## Implementation
```python
class StartupCoordinator:
    async def listen_phase(self, duration_sec: float) -> int:
        """Listen and return count of unique nodes heard."""
        ...
    
    def calculate_delay(self, nodes_heard: int) -> float:
        """Return delay in seconds based on density."""
        return min(300, nodes_heard * 5)
```

## Testing
- Unit test for delay calculation
- Integration test showing staggered startup
close_reason: Python Node and scheduler updated with StartupCoordinator, listen phase, unique node tracking from RX, scaled delay applied to announces
